required_behavior: Map Protocol 775 Login clientbound packet id 0x03 to the existing SetInitialCompression packet shape that preserves the official minecraft:login_compression mapping.
Decode the official body shape from the generated answer: one FriendlyByteBuf VarInt compressionThreshold.
Consume the full official body bytes for oracle/answers/775/login_compression_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl.
Do not edit oracle answers or infer packet facts outside the generated official artifact.
stop_boundary: Implement only Protocol 775 Login clientbound minecraft:login_compression packet dispatch/body support needed for the exact oracle test. Do not implement custom_query, cookie_request, compression negotiation policy, connection compression activation, Login-to-Configuration transition behavior, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or UI behavior.
